comment: "Overall, this course offered valuable insight into the anesthetic considerations for craniotomy and brain tumour resection. The content was clinically relevant and thoughtfully organized. I particularly appreciated the emphasis on neurophysiological stability, airway management strategies, and the importance of multidisciplinary coordination. Thank you for the opportunity to participate—this course has contributed meaningfully to my ongoing professional development in neuroanesthesia."

"Overall, the course was highly informative and well-structured. It provided a solid foundation in the principles and practical considerations of anesthesia for craniotomy. I appreciate the focus on safety, hemodynamic control, and cerebral protection. Thank you for making this valuable resource available."
"I found this course covers a really interesting intersection of physiology, pharmacology, and surgical technique all critical to optimizing neurosurgical patient care to be particularly valuable."
"I found the sequence of presentation and the classification of the indications for elective Craniotomy together with the drugs used and monitoring protocols to be particularly valuable."
"The topic is new to me. Hence it was so interesting to learn and I learned so much from the topic ."
"This course is interesting for the latest information. Furthermore it was very helpful in the aspect of clinical practice ."
